english_text: Surah Yusuf chiastic 12-box outline (dream → plot → seductions → imprisonment → king's dream → king's dream interpreted → freedom → confessions → brothers' lesson → dream fulfilled).
alt_text: Twelve-box chiastic structure diagram of Surah Yusuf — same as binder 34 ch153 img 007.
notes: Reused Surah Yusuf chiasm; content-duplicate of binder 34 ch153 img 007.
